cards.title: CVD & Respiratory Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hypertension Protocol: Hip bath (35°C) + yoga (Shavasana) + DASH diet + CoQ10
  • Asthma Protocol: Steam inhalation + Pranayama (Anulom-Vilom) + omega-3 + elimination diet
  • Heart failure: Low-sodium diet + gentle yoga + hawthorn extract
  • Hyperlipidaemia: Plant sterols + omega-3 + red yeast rice

cards.title: Gut, Anxiety & Neurological Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • IBS Protocol: Low-FODMAP + gut-directed hypnotherapy + peppermint oil EC
  • Anxiety Protocol: Ashwagandha 600mg + yoga Nidra + L-theanine + CBT-i
  • Insomnia: CBT-I + melatonin 0.5mg + magnesium glycinate + sleep hygiene
  • Depression: Exercise 150 min/wk + omega-3 EPA >1g + St. John's Wort (mild-mod)

cards.title: Metabolic & Skin Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • T2DM Protocol: Berberine 500mg TID + low GI diet + resistance exercise + Bitter melon
  • PCOS Protocol: Inositol (Myo:D-chiro 40:1) + spearmint tea + low GI + Vitex
  • Acne Protocol: Zinc 30mg + omega-3 + low GI diet + probiotic + niacinamide topical
  • Hypothyroidism: Selenium 200µg + iodine foods + Ashwagandha + stress management
